response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the video as a concert performance by the VTuber unit ReGLOSS.
2. 00:00 - 03:26: Recognized the song as 'Hikoutei' by King Gnu. Searched for official Japanese lyrics and their English translation.
3. 03:26 - 05:01: The song transitions into an original ReGLOSS performance. Text on screen confirms 'Music: ReGLOSS'. The lyrics mention the members' names ('Otonose Kanade', 'Ichijou Ririka', etc.) and the song title 'Oki Doki! Easy Breezy'. Searched for lyrics, but only found references to other songs with similar names. Provided an approximate lyric transcription based on the video for this section.
response.global_summary: A concert performance by the VTuber unit ReGLOSS (Hololive). The video features a performance of 'Hikoutei' by King Gnu, followed by their own original song, 'Oki Doki! Easy Breezy'.

scenes.description: The unit ReGLOSS performs the song 'Hikoutei' by King Gnu in a concert setting. Visuals show them dancing and singing.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
What kind of dream shall we go see?
Don't be afraid only of what is right
Flying around freely, woah
Step by step
Engrave the beat
Shall we continue this endless party?

Jump on this era
Tonight, take off from this city
Fly around in the vast sky
Shake your life, shake your life, yeah
Jump on this wind
Tonight, become the eye of the typhoon
Fly around in the vast sky
Shake your life, shake your life, yeah

In a corner of a daily life that never changes
It would be nice if I could just laugh innocently
Shall we continue this meaningless journey?, woah
One by one
It's fine to go one step at a time
Swallow both cheers and jeers

Jump on this era
Tonight, become a foolish stake
Don't be afraid of mistakes
Shake your life, shake your life, yeah
Jump on this wind
Tonight, become a nameless wind
Swallow both clear and murky things
Shake your life, shake your life, yeah

Let it rain heavily
Shake the earth
Celebrate the past
Carry the tomorrow
Shake your life
Shake your life, yeah (Repeated)

Fly around in the vast sky
